outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Combined negative GEX (-5.55B) places dealers in short gamma regime. Any directional move will be amplified by hedging flows. Volatility suppression unlikely.
outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning with PCR 2.27-3.52 and smirk skew in Weekly/Monthly expiries indicates fear-driven hedging. Negative total GEX across all timeframes creates volatile, amplified price action. Max Pain at 645 (only 0.8% below spot) acts as powerful magnet. 630 RESONANCE level is critical structural support - breach triggers accelerated selling below gamma flip.

levels.motivazione: TRUE RESONANCE: Massive put OI across ALL expiries - 0DTE 25.5K, WEEKLY 144.7K (dominant), MONTHLY 116.3K. Primary structural support confirmed by bearish skew.
0DTE Max Pain only 0.8% below spot - strong price attraction target. Coincides with 23.4K put OI. Market maker profit maximization zone.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE 19.6K + MONTHLY 101.1K put OI. Massive 0DTE volume (559K) signals institutional accumulation. Secondary support above resonance.
0DTE gamma equilibrium point. Below this level, dealer hedging inverts to accelerating selling. Critical regime change threshold.
WEEKLY dominant call OI (16.4K) with competing put interest (18.7K). Mixed positioning creates overhead resistance near 1.5% above spot.
Current spot zone with heavy bilateral 0DTE OI: 24.5K puts + 17.7K calls. Pin risk potential creates choppy price action at expiration.
